sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92572" key="r(odalo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥοδ-ᾰλός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>,= <sense id="n92572.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ῥόδινος, παρειαί</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:501" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.501</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
